/home/runner/work/Open1722/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libopen1722.so.0.1.0 -o libopen1722.so.0.1.0 CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/CommonHeader.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/Crf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/Rvf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/Udp.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/Utils.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/AcfCommon.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Can.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/CanBrief.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/FlexRay.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Gpc.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Lin.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Most.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Ntscf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Sensor.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/SensorBrief.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/acf/Tscf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/aaf/Aaf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/aaf/Pcm.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/cvf/Cvf.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/cvf/H264.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/cvf/Jpeg2000.c.o CMakeFiles/open1722.dir/avtp/cvf/Mjpeg.c.o
